query:
INSERT INTO products (category_id, name, description, price, is_seasonal, is_vegan, is_sugar_free) VALUES 
((SELECT id FROM categories WHERE slug = 'icecream' LIMIT 1), 'MUU Coco Loco', 'Helado artesanal de coco fresco, cremoso y natural.', 65, false, true, false),
((SELECT id FROM categories WHERE slug = 'icecream' LIMIT 1), 'Double Cow', 'Vainilla y chocolate con trozos de brownie y fudge.', 85, false, false, false),
((SELECT id FROM categories WHERE slug = 'bowls' LIMIT 1), 'Surf Bowl', 'Base de acai con granola artesanal, plátano y fresas.', 115, false, true, false),
((SELECT id FROM categories WHERE slug = 'bowls' LIMIT 1), 'Bowl Zicatela', 'Frutas tropicales frescas con un toque de miel de agave.', 95, true, true, true)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
